globalNews.title: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say
globalNews.summary: President Donald Trump said the operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.

globalNews.title: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
globalNews.summary: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.

globalNews.title: US planning to charge ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
globalNews.summary: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.

globalNews.title: Toddlers among more than 50 schoolchildren kidnapped in Nigeria
globalNews.summary: No group has yet claimed responsibility for the attacks, which have devastated Mussa town in Borno state.

globalNews.title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
globalNews.summary: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.

cryptoNews.title: THORChain confirms $10M exploit, rolls out recovery portal for affected users
cryptoNews.summary: THORChain has launched a recovery portal following a $10 million exploit, allowing affected users across four chains to revoke malicious approvals and claim refunds.

cryptoNews.title: Sharplink CEO points out 3 catalysts for Ethereum's price to surge higher
cryptoNews.summary: The rest of the world is “really closely” watching the US CLARITY Act as the nation moves further away from the previous “hostile stance,” according to Sharplink’s chief.

cryptoNews.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1B in a week, snapping six-week inflow run
cryptoNews.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs shed $1 billion in a single week as capital rotated toward AI stocks and macro uncertainty weighed on sentiment, ending a six-week run that had pulled in $3.4 billion.

cryptoNews.title: US CLARITY Act brings ‘major spike of euphoria’ to Bitcoin: Santiment
cryptoNews.summary: Santiment warned that the crypto market “typically” moves against crowd expectations, pointing to a recent rise in bullish sentiment driven by renewed momentum around the US CLARITY Act.

cryptoNews.title: House committee leaders urge Trump to nominate CFTC members, citing CLARITY Act
cryptoNews.summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission is currently headed by Chair Michael Selig, with no public statement from Donald Trump about fully staffing the five-member panel of commissioners.

aiNews.title: The OpenAI trial wraps up, and the Musk founder machine keeps spinning
aiNews.summary: The Musk v. Altman trial came to a close this week, and the final arguments kept circling back to one question: can we trust the people in charge of AI? All of this is playing out as SpaceX charges to

aiNews.title: Silicon Valley’s vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
aiNews.summary: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite vacation spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

aiNews.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
aiNews.summary: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.

aiNews.title: Runway started by helping filmmakers — now it wants to beat Google at AI
aiNews.summary: AI video-generation startup Runway is betting that video generation is the path to world models. And that being an AI outsider is an advantage, not a liability.

aiNews.title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
aiNews.summary: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.
